prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic scene of a successful businessman sitting alone in a sleek black leather lounge chair inside a luxurious high-rise penthouse office at night. He wears a deep navy tailored suit, dark dress shirt, polished black shoes, and a wristwatch, seated with legs crossed while holding a phone to his ear in a calm, focused pose. His face is softly obscured and anonymous. Floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the left side, revealing a dramatic nighttime New York City skyline with the Empire State Building brightly lit under a dark blue stormy sky. A small round glass side table with a tumbler of water sits beside him. The interior is dark, modern, and expensive, with glossy black marble floors reflecting the city lights, recessed ceiling spotlights, a sofa in the background, illuminated shelving, and a large moody abstract wall artwork. Use low-key lighting, deep blue and charcoal tones, crisp reflections, high contrast, realistic architectural photography, executive luxury atmosphere, quiet success, solitude, ambition, 16:9 square-cropped composition, ultra-detailed, GPT Image 2 photorealism.
